CustomField.description: Date the Active Student Enrollment Percent became greater than or equal to 90%. Used to capture the date outside of the funnel automation logic that only captures the Student Enrollment Threshold date after the Onboarding Training Call occurs.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Date the Active Student Enrollment Percent became greater than or equal to 90%. Updated by sfdc flow called: CF - Active Student Enrollment Percent Met Date
CustomField.label: Active Student Enrollment Percent Met
